auth.forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your username or email and we'll send you a 6-digit code.
auth.resetCodeSentMessage: If an account matches, we just sent a 6-digit reset code. It's valid for 30 minutes.
auth.resetPasswordSubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your email and choose a new password (min. 8 characters).
auth.resetCodeInvalid: Please enter the 6-digit code from your email.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetSuccessMessage: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in.
auth.appleLinkedMessage: We linked your Apple ID to your existing Glow Up account. Next time, just tap Sign in with Apple.
auth.appleNotLinked: No account is linked to this Apple ID. Please log in with your username first, then link your Apple ID in Settings.

card.glowScoreDesc: Your Glow Score reflects your overall tennis development. It combines your session attendance, skill assessments from coaches, match performance, and engagement with the platform. Keep attending sessions and getting coach feedback to boost it!

play.title: Play
play.checkBackSoon: Check back soon for new group lessons
play.playersWillAppear: Players in your academy will appear here
play.tourFindMatchDesc: Tap here to create a match and challenge other players nearby.
play.tourManageBookingsDesc: Check your invites and set your play preferences here.
play.tourBrowseOptionsDesc: Switch between group lessons and discovering players near you.

morning: Up early, {{name}}? The courts are calling.
weekend_evening: Cap the weekend with a match, {{name}}.
welcomeBack: Long time, {{name}} — let's get back on court.

home.completeProfileDesc: Add a photo and personalise your tennis profile
home.joinAcademyDesc: Connect with a tennis academy near you
home.bookFirstSessionDesc: Schedule a training session with your coach
home.checkProgressDesc: See your skill ratings and Glow Score
home.tourPlayerCardDesc: Your level, XP, and Glow Score at a glance. Keep playing to level up!
home.tourSessionsDesc: See your upcoming training sessions. Tap to view details or check in.
home.tourDiscoverDesc: Find other players nearby, open sessions to join, and training opportunities.
home.tourHelpDesc: Tap here anytime for FAQs, tutorials, and support.
home.welcomeDesc: Your personal tennis companion. Track your progress, connect with coaches, and level up your game.
home.trackProgressDesc: Every session earns you XP. Watch your Glow Score grow as you improve across all skill areas.
home.connectCompeteDesc: Find other players near you, book courts, join matches, and climb the leaderboard.
home.readyToPlayDesc: Complete your Getting Started checklist on the home screen to set everything up. Let's go!
home.tipXp: Tip: Attend sessions regularly to earn XP and level up faster
home.tipProfile: Tip: Complete your profile to unlock more features
home.tipCommunity: Tip: Check the Community tab to find players near you
home.tipFeedback: Tip: Check your Feedback Center after each session for coach insights
home.tipCredits: Tip: Keep an eye on your credits to make sure you have enough for bookings
home.faqBookSession: How do I book a session?
home.faqBookSessionAnswer: Tap 'Book Lesson' on your home screen or go to the Schedule tab to see available sessions.
home.faqGlowScoreAnswer: Your Glow Score reflects your overall tennis skill level. It's calculated from coach assessments across 6 skill pillars.
home.faqEarnXpAnswer: You earn XP by attending sessions, completing challenges, and achieving milestones. XP increases your player level.
home.faqCreditsAnswer: Credits are prepaid lesson tokens. You use them to book sessions. Different session types use different credit types (private, semi-private, group).
home.faqFindPlayers: How do I find other players?
home.faqFindPlayersAnswer: Go to the Community tab to see players near you, or check the Play tab for open matches and social games.
home.faqBallLevelAnswer: Ball Level indicates your skill stage: Red (beginner), Orange, Green, Yellow (advanced), or Adult DSS for competitive adults.
home.hitTheCourt: Book a lesson or find players to hit with
home.whyCancel: Why do you need to cancel?
home.lateDescription: Let your coach know you're on the way. How late will you be?
home.latePlaceholder: e.g. Traffic, will be there soon!
home.issueReportedMsg: Your coach will be notified about this issue.
home.lateCancellationMsg: This counts as a late cancellation. -50 XP
home.coachNotifiedMsg: Your coach has been notified that you're running late.
home.checkedInMsg: You're checked in for this session!
home.failedCheckIn: Failed to check in. Please try again.
home.noActiveSession: No active session found. Please try again.
home.selectIssueTypeMsg: Please select the type of issue you're experiencing.
home.noSessionFound: No session found to check into.
home.contactCoachExtend: Contact your coach to extend this session.
home.selectReasonMsg: Please select a reason for cancellation.
home.enterReasonMsg: Please explain why you need to cancel.
home.confirmCancelMsg: Are you sure you want to cancel this session? This action cannot be undone.
home.selectTimeMsg: Please select how late you'll be.

schedule.sessionsUpdateAutomatically: Sessions update automatically when your coach creates them
schedule.lessonsWillBePaused: Your lessons will be paused during this period

vacationBanner.subtitle: Sessions in this period are paused
vacationBanner.responsibility: You are responsible for declaring your absences. Sessions in this period are paused — sessions you don't cancel will still be charged.

schedule.balanceOk: You're all set for upcoming lessons.
schedule.balanceEmpty: No lessons left — top up to keep playing.
schedule.noNextLessonSubtitle: Book your next session to get back on court.
schedule.bookSheetTitle: What would you like to book?
schedule.findMatchDesc: Match with a player at your level
schedule.heroEmptyTitle: Nothing scheduled — perfect time to book.
schedule.heroVacationTitle: Enjoy your vacation. Sessions are paused.
schedule.subscribeGoogleDesc: Open in Google Calendar to subscribe

schedule.copyCalendarLinkDesc: Paste in any calendar app that supports ICS
schedule.calendarPermissionRequired: Calendar access is required to add this event.
schedule.selectBothDates: Please select both start and end dates.
schedule.endBeforeStart: End date must be on or after the start date.
schedule.guestSubtitle: Sign in to see your sessions, court bookings and matches in one place.

holidays.title: Holidays & Absences

holidays.cancelConfirmBody: Are you sure you want to cancel this vacation period? Lessons will resume.

holidays.invalidDatesBody: End date must be after start date.
holidays.activeShortenError: An active vacation can only be extended, not shortened.
holidays.activeStartLockedNote: This vacation has already started, so the start date is locked. You can extend the end date.

profile.othersCanFind: Others can find you for matches
